key_points: In earlier times, many societies believed that women were less capable than men
Girls were often not allowed to go to school and were expected to do household work
Over time, social reformers worked to improve education and rights for women
Education helps women gain confidence, independence, and better opportunities
Women today work in many fields such as science, politics, education, sports, and business
examples: Savitribai Phule opened schools for girls in India and promoted women's education
Rashsundari Devi secretly learned to read and later wrote her autobiography
Kalpana Chawla became an astronaut and inspired many girls to study science
Women today work as doctors, teachers, engineers, and leaders
Self-help groups allow women to work together, earn income, and support families
exam_tips: Remember key reformers who supported women's education
Understand how education changed the lives of women
Learn examples of women succeeding in different fields
Focus on the importance of equality and opportunities for women
